home.subtitle: The Forge of Time
home.securedByClerk: Secure encrypted access provided by Clerk.

dashboard.title: Chamber of Legacies
dashboard.subtitle: Here you store and manage your time capsules.
dashboard.noCapsulesSubtitle: Click on "Forge New Relic" to begin.

deleteModal.title: Delete Relic
deleteModal.confirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this relic? All saved files and messages will be lost forever in the flow of time.

alerts.deleteSuccess: Relic successfully removed from the registry.
alerts.deleteFail: Failed to delete the capsule from the Temporal Registry. Check your permissions.
alerts.connError: Connection error trying to perform operation.

forge.title: Forge New Relic
forge.subtitle: Define Relic Parameters
forge.fieldIsGift: Is this relic a gift for someone else?
forge.fieldGiftMsgPlaceholder: Write something for the recipient to read when the chest opens...
forge.testMode: Test Mode (Allows opening at any time for debugging)
forge.estimateNote: Estimate based on plan and chosen date
forge.paymentNote: Single payment. No future costs for heirs.
forge.storageNote: During testing, we limit storage to ensure system stability.

validation.dateMin: The unlock date must be at least 2 days in the future.
validation.dateMax: The unlock date must be at most 100 years in the future.

vault.lockedSubtitle: This relic is locked by time until {date}.
vault.unlockedSubtitle: The temporal seal has been broken. The legacy is revealed.
vault.noMemories: No memories added to this capsule yet.

alerts.sizeExceeded: The artifact exceeds the limit set by the relic's size.
alerts.forgeError: A magnetic interference prevented the memory from being anchored in time.
alerts.checkoutError: The temporal anomaly prevented the financial connection. Try again.
alerts.notOwner: You do not have permission to manage this capsule.

vault.sealedFooter: Receptacle protected by the seal of eternity
vault.restoringDesc: Your relic is being restored from the depths of time (Glacier). This process takes up to 48 hours.
vault.connectionFailed: The dimensional connection failed during the transfer.

dropzone.dragText: Drag physical memories or click to explore
dropzone.limitText: Supports photos, videos, audios, and texts (Max {limit})
dropzone.textModalPlaceholder: Type here what you wish to eternalize...

earlyUnlock.modalDesc: Interrupting the timeline and extracting your relics before the scheduled date requires a forced decompression of the vault. This action has an energy cost.

paymentSuccess.title: The Seal Has Been Forged
paymentSuccess.subtitle: Your payment has been confirmed by the Central Vault. The temporal anomaly is being stabilized and your capsule has been permanently locked.

forgeModal.subtitle: Configure the eternal record of this memory
forgeModal.writePlaceholder: Enter thoughts or facts that deserve to endure through time (minimum 3 characters)...

relicGallery.readError: The attached file could not be read as plain text or is corrupted.
relicGallery.cannotTranscribe: This document was attached as a file and could not be transcribed visually.
